docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $682.59 FILED BY GOLDEN GATE FURNITURE INC AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS JAMES AKA MAYERS JAMES G ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-02-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE FURNITURE INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MYERS JAMES AKA MAYERS JAMES G $682.59 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $723.59 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF GOLDEN GATE FURNITURE INC
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MYERS JAMES AKA MAYERS JAMES G
